productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Black Pink Checked Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has black and pink gingham checks with blue, white and grey accents, panel detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with zippered closures, embroidered brand name over the left pocket, full length buttoned placket with black buttons and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  black and pink gingham check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
